referenceArchitecture:
A single-node, layered GraphRAG-style stack for 1-2 analysts: heavy continuous ingest feeds a credibility-weighted, bi-temporal knowledge graph plus a vector index, which a rigorous offline analysis layer ranks/clusters/summarizes into a navigable bilingual (KR+EN) structure exported to a read-only presentation surface. The system structures information; the human renders every investment judgment. No layer ever emits a buy/sell/price-target — sentiment, catalysts, and lead-lag are stored only as source-attributed, provenance-weighted OBSERVATIONS with caveats, never aggregated into a directional call.

THE SPINE DECISION (the one real fork). I choose an ALL-POSTGRES single engine — Postgres + pgvector + Apache AGE — over the two-engine Graphiti/FalkorDB + Postgres design, and I own the giveup. Reasoning: the landscape agent's case for BUYING Graphiti was 'hand-rolling bi-temporal supersession is the easiest place for rigor to silently fail.' But the credibility agent — who saw further — established that (a) Graphiti's default AUTO-INVALIDATES-on-contradiction, which would ERASE the rumor→denial→confirmation trail an analyst must navigate, so you must override that behavior; (b) you must independently VERIFY Graphiti's as-of queries filter on transaction-time, not just valid-time; and (c) you must bolt on provenance/credibility/ticker-anchored resolution regardless. So 'buying the bitemporal core' buys far less than it appears while forcing a second backup/restore boundary and a cross-engine consistency risk (a graph node desyncing from its Postgres provenance/resolution row silently corrupts importance and identity). Against constraint 5 (don't over-engineer; 1-2 consumers) and the fact that time-is-not-a-constraint/rigor-is, one engine with one transaction boundary covering relational + graph + vector is the coherent choice. Bi-temporal correctness is implemented explicitly as SQL:2011-style validity columns (event_time/valid_from/valid_to + ingest_time/knowledge_time), which — because it is visible, testable, and parameterized — is auditable in a way a framework's hidden semantics are not. WHAT I GIVE UP: Graphiti's free incremental dedup/episode model and its battle-tested supersession logic; I must hand-build validity-interval supersession and prove no-lookahead with frozen-as-of-T snapshot tests. This is acceptable ONLY because rigor is required and time is not constrained.

TWO THREADS RUN THROUGH EVERY LAYER. (1) NO-TRADING-SIGNAL is enforced STRUCTURALLY, not by policy: the financial ontology makes sentiment/catalysts typed, source-attributed, provenance-weighted ATTRIBUTES that the system never sums; analysis emits only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional EDGES labeled 'information X led series Y at lag k (q<0.05)'; summarization prompts forbid buy/sell/price-target vocabulary and carry caveats verbatim. (2) CREDIBILITY IS ITSELF BI-TEMPORAL — the deepest insight in the dossier and the fusion point of the temporal and credibility layers: a source's reputation as-of T uses only track-record resolved by T, and corroboration-count as-of T counts only confirmations whose knowledge-time ≤ T. Without this rule you reintroduce lookahead THROUGH the credibility channel — ranking a claim as 'corroborated by 3 sources' using voices that only spoke up after the decision date. Every credibility/importance query takes knowledge-time as a mandatory parameter.

END-TO-END FLOW. INGEST (Dagster on one box) runs a two-tier source strategy: Tier-1 high-credibility structured spine (DART/OpenDART + corp_code registry for KR, SEC EDGAR + CIK for US, GDELT for the pre-extracted global news graph, Alpaca + CCXT/Upbit/Binance for prices) and Tier-2 adversarial community layer (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI, crypto Telegram channel-history via Telethon MESSAGES-ONLY, X for narrow cashtag pulls only). Reddit is RULED OUT of the core (Nov-2025 pre-approval + explicit AI-training prohibition is a policy blocker for an LLM-structuring DB). Provenance + source-credibility class are stamped AT CRAWL TIME with both event_time and ingest_time (trust and point-in-time cannot be reconstructed later). A mandatory cheap pre-filter cascade runs BEFORE any LLM: trafilatura clean-text → lingua language-detect → Kiwi/MeCab-ko Korean segmentation → MinHash-LSH exact/near-dup → BGE-M3 embedding near-dup clustering (collapses copy-pasted pump consensus so it can't inflate importance) → salience/credibility gate. RESOLVE (the #1 build) anchors every entity to an authoritative ID via a three-level Issuer→Security→Listing store (LEI-where-available + DART corp_code + SEC CIK as guaranteed issuer keys; ISIN/Share-Class FIGI per security so common vs preferred are distinct; venue FIGI/ticker per listing), with tickers/cashtags/slang (삼전, 하닉) as TIME-SCOPED alias edges (never keys — $V was Vivendi then Visa). Resolution is gazetteer-anchored LINKING (bounded universe), not million-record dedup: deterministic ID join → BGE-M3/LaBSE+romanization blocking to top-k → closed-set LLM that picks among candidates OR ABSTAINS (never free-generates), with must-link (shared ID) / must-not-link (different ISIN; parent vs subsidiary from DART 기업집단) constraints; abstain → human review queue. EXTRACT emits schema-guided triples through strict function-calling: {canonical_id, relation(enum), target, source_span, source_id+credibility, event_time, ingest_time, confidence}, on a tiered cascade (Haiku-class candidate flag → Opus-4.8 schema-constrained extraction on high-salience/high-credibility survivors only, ontology prompt-cached ~90%, Batch API 50% off for backfill), with local DeBERTa NLI entailment verification reserved for high-stakes edges. STORE writes everything into Postgres: AGE graph nodes/edges with bi-temporal validity, pgvector BGE-M3 embeddings, and relational tables for the resolution master, provenance, credibility, and cost-tiering bookkeeping — one backup, one transaction. ANALYZE (scheduled batch + incremental on deltas, parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge, T_valid)) computes importance as credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank with TrustRank teleport seeded on regulator/filing nodes — NEVER raw centrality, which ranks LOUD over TRUE — fused with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) that estimates per-source reliability and folds independence (CIB/pump detection collapses a coordinated cluster to ~one effective source). Clustering is recursive Leiden (not Louvain) on the credibility-weighted graph FUSED with BERTopic/HDBSCAN over BGE-M3 multilingual embeddings (agreement = real theme). Info-flow is gated and rigor-critical: ADF+KPSS stationarity on returns → MI screen → Granger first pass → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy (conditioned on index/sector/macro common drivers) → IAAFT surrogate significance → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR across all pairs; only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional edges are annotated. PRESENT runs GraphRAG-style map-reduce summarization (forbidding buy/sell language, citing provenance + as-of time, exposing the credibility mix) and exports the ranked/clustered/temporal graph to Obsidian as generated, read-mostly bilingual markdown — entity pages with provenance-weighted importance, validity windows, source citations, theme notes — the navigable surface on which the human decides.

layers.choice: Single-node Dagster (asset/partition orchestrator) on ONE box, two-tier source strategy: Tier-1 structured spine (DART/OpenDART, SEC EDGAR, GDELT news graph, Alpaca + CCXT/Upbit/Binance) and Tier-2 adversarial community (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI self-host, Telegram channel-history via Telethon messages-only, X narrow cashtag pulls). Provenance + source-credibility class + event_time/ingest_time stamped AT CRAWL TIME. Mandatory pre-filter cascade before any LLM: trafilatura → lingua → Kiwi/MeCab-ko → MinHash-LSH → BGE-M3 near-dup → salience/credibility gate.
layers.why: Constraint 5 (heavy ingest, 1-2 consumers) favors single-node batch+incremental; Dagster's asset/partition lineage gives retry/backfill visibility across many FLAKY sources (anti-bot, FloodWait, 429s, HTML drift) that bare cron lacks. GDELT pre-extracts entities/themes/tone, saving enormous LLM cost (constraint 4). Crawl-time provenance/credibility + bi-temporal stamping is non-reconstructible later (constraints 2,3). The pre-filter cascade is what keeps the LLM bill bounded (constraint 4) and collapses copy-pasted pump consensus before it can inflate importance (constraint 3). KR morphological segmentation BEFORE dedup/embedding is mandatory or 삼성전자 won't collapse (constraint 1).
layers.alternativesRejected: Kafka/Spark/distributed ingestion — RULED OUT: scale you don't have at 2 consumers, pure ops burden. Reddit as a core source — RULED OUT: Nov-2025 pre-approval gate + explicit AI/ML-training prohibition is a policy blocker for an LLM-structuring DB; include only as a minor, explicitly-approved, low-weight signal if at all. yfinance as a pipeline dependency — rejected (unofficial scraping, IP bans); Alpaca free-tier is the price backbone. Bare cron — rejected as primary (no blast-radius visibility) but kept as the documented fallback if the pipeline stays tiny.

layers.choice: Schema-guided/ontology-constrained extraction emitted through strict JSON-schema function-calling. Fixed-core, human-extensible financial ontology (Company/Person/Product/Event/Catalyst; supplies/competes_with/owns/guides_to). Output schema: {canonical_id, relation(enum), target, source_span, source_id+credibility, event_time, ingest_time, confidence}. Model tiering: Haiku-class candidate flag → Opus-4.8 schema-constrained extraction only on high-salience/high-credibility survivors (ontology prompt-cached ~90% input savings, Batch API 50% off for backfill). Local DeBERTa-class multilingual NLI entailment check reserved for high-stakes edges (supply-chain, catalysts, high-rank-but-low-credibility). Self-consistency only where a single pass is uncertain.
layers.why: A fixed relation ENUM is the only thing that makes KR and EN extractions land on the SAME edge type so a bilingual graph collapses (constraint 1). Strict function-calling makes illegal predicates and missing provenance structurally impossible and forces span+bi-temporal grounding at generation time (constraints 2,3). The ontology is where no-trading-signal is enforced STRUCTURALLY: sentiment/catalysts are typed source-attributed ATTRIBUTES the system never aggregates (GOAL). Tiering answers 'can't LLM every item' (constraint 4); model IDs/prices confirmed via claude-api skill (Opus 4.8 $5/$25, Haiku $1/$5, caching, batch).
layers.alternativesRejected: Open IE (free-form triples) as the graph of record — RULED OUT: non-canonical predicates produce different nodes AND edge labels for 삼성전자가 HBM을 공급 vs Samsung supplies HBM, breaking cross-lingual node collapse; allowed only as an optional recall-boosting candidate pass feeding canonicalization. Schema-free emergent graph — rejected: edge semantics drift per document, verification-hard, untrustworthy. LLM-on-every-crawled-item — rejected: the exact cost blow-up constraint 4 forbids. Universal NLI on every edge — rejected: cost-prohibitive; gate to high-stakes edges only.

layers.choice: Gated hybrid pipeline on a three-level Issuer→Security→Listing canonical store. Issuer keyed by LEI-where-available + DART corp_code + SEC CIK (guaranteed keys); Security by ISIN + Share-Class FIGI (common vs preferred are DISTINCT securities); Listing by venue/Composite FIGI + ticker. Tickers/cashtags/romanizations/slang (삼전, 하닉) are TIME-SCOPED alias edges [valid_from,valid_to), never keys. Cascade: deterministic official-ID join → cheap pre-filters → BGE-M3/LaBSE + romanization + alias blocking to top-k → closed-set LLM that picks among candidates OR ABSTAINS (never free-generates) → constrained clustering with must-link (shared ID) / must-not-link (different ISIN; parent vs subsidiary from DART 기업집단). Splink/Fellegi-Sunter on embedded DuckDB for batch issuer-master construction across registries (term-frequency down-weighting of 삼성/Samsung). Abstain/low-confidence → human review queue.
layers.why: This is the make-or-break #1 build — if 삼성전자=Samsung Electronics=005930 don't collapse, the graph is noise and every downstream metric is invalid (constraint 1). Anchoring to authoritative immutable IDs gives zero-false-merge guarantees; the three-level model dissolves the preferred/common and ADR/multi-venue traps structurally instead of special-casing. The bounded listed universe makes this gazetteer LINKING not million-record dedup — the simplifier that justifies single-node (constraint 5). Time-scoped aliases interlock with bi-temporal: $V resolves to Vivendi as-of-2007, Visa as-of-2026 (constraint 2, no lookahead). Abstention realizes the GOAL: AI structures, human judges. DuckDB+Splink (batch issuer-master) and Postgres (serving store) coexist — they are not competitors.
layers.alternativesRejected: Flat 'one node per company' model — RULED OUT: provably cannot represent common vs preferred (one ISIN digit apart) or ADR/OTC listings; forces false merges. End-to-end LLM free-generates the entity — RULED OUT: hallucinates IDs, silently false-merges, unbounded cost (violates constraints 1 and 4), no abstention/provenance. LLM/string dedup alone — rejected: cross-lingual identity won't resolve without registry anchoring. Spark/distributed ER — rejected: bounded universe makes it unnecessary.

layers.choice: All-Postgres single engine: Apache AGE (openCypher graph) for bi-temporal nodes/edges, pgvector (BGE-M3 embeddings, multilingual KR+EN) for semantic retrieval, and relational tables for the resolution master, provenance, credibility scores, and cost-tiering bookkeeping (dedup hashes, embedding-sim, salience). Bi-temporal modeled explicitly as SQL:2011-style columns: event_time/valid_from/valid_to + ingest_time/knowledge_time; superseded facts INVALIDATED not deleted; rumor→denial→confirmation kept as parallel competing edges via superseded_by/contradicted_by, with a nightly materialized 'current consensus' view.
layers.why: One engine = one backup, one transaction boundary covering relational+graph+vector — the simplest answer to constraint 5 and the natural home for the custom layers no off-the-shelf tool provides (ticker-anchored resolution, provenance, cost-tiering). Explicit validity columns make bi-temporal VISIBLE, testable, and parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge,T_valid) — auditable in a way a framework's hidden semantics are not (constraint 2). Vector latency (pgvector ~11ms vs Qdrant ~4ms) is irrelevant at 2 consumers. Keeping competing edges preserves the rumor trail an analyst must navigate.
layers.alternativesRejected: Graphiti on FalkorDB/Neo4j as bought temporal core — REJECTED after the credibility agent's evidence: its default auto-invalidates-on-contradiction (erasing the rumor→denial→confirmation trail), you must verify its as-of filters on transaction-time, and you must bolt on provenance/credibility/ticker-resolution anyway — so it buys less than it appears while adding a second backup/restore boundary and a cross-engine graph-vs-provenance-row desync risk. The giveup: I now hand-build validity-interval supersession (the easiest place for rigor to slip) and must prove no-lookahead with frozen-as-of-T snapshot tests. Standalone Qdrant/Weaviate/Milvus — RULED OUT: a stateful service to babysit for speed/scale 2 consumers never use. Microsoft GraphRAG static index — RULED OUT: batch/static, wrong for continuous ingest, ~16.6% accuracy drop on time-sensitive queries. Obsidian-as-backend — RULED OUT: presentation only, no query engine or temporal logic. Caveat on AGE: operationally fiddly (source install, trails newest PG majors), acceptable at this scale and rigor budget.

layers.choice: Importance = credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank with TrustRank teleport seeded on regulator/filing nodes, FUSED with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) estimating per-source reliability and independence-aware corroboration (CIB/pump detection collapses coordinated clusters to ~one effective source). Annotate with HITS authority, k-core, eigenvector, sampled betweenness as secondary lenses. Clustering: recursive Leiden (fixed seed) on the credibility-weighted graph FUSED with BERTopic (multilingual SBERT/BGE-M3 → UMAP[fixed seed] → HDBSCAN → c-TF-IDF). Info-flow (gated): ADF+KPSS on returns → MI screen → Granger → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy (conditioned on index/sector/macro) → IAAFT surrogates → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR. All computation parameterized by as-of (T_knowledge,T_valid); credibility itself is bi-temporal (reputation/corroboration as-of T use only evidence resolved by T).
layers.why: Pure centrality ranks LOUD (pump/rumor co-mentions) over TRUE — the explicit failure constraint 3 warns of; folding credibility into edge weights AND teleport, plus independence-aware truth-discovery, ranks TRUE over LOUD. Leiden over Louvain because Louvain yields internally-disconnected communities (a correctness bug). Fusing structural Leiden with semantic BERTopic — agreement = real theme, not artifact. The stationarity→MI→Granger→conditional-TE→surrogate→FDR protocol is where rigor is actually met: bivariate TE on price levels manufactures confident common-driver garbage; conditioning + IAAFT + Benjamini-YEKULIETI (for cross-sectionally correlated market tests) is mandatory. 'Credibility is bi-temporal' is the fusion of the temporal and credibility layers — without it you leak lookahead through the credibility channel.
layers.alternativesRejected: Raw PageRank/eigenvector/HITS as primary ranking — RULED OUT: ranks manufactured co-mention/pump volume; eigenvector especially (no teleport escape, trivially gamed). HippoRAG PPR without trust priors — rejected for the same LOUD-over-TRUE reason; usable only personalized with provenance. Louvain — rejected (disconnected communities). Bivariate Granger/TE on non-stationary prices — RULED OUT: invents spurious common-driver edges, the textbook false-rigor trap. RAPTOR as the live index — rejected (static tree, hostile to incremental updates); allowed only as a periodic offline clustering pass over time-windowed slices. Any reading of a lead-lag edge as a trading signal — forbidden by the GOAL.

layers.choice: GraphRAG-style map-reduce hierarchical summarization (prioritizing high-degree + high-credibility elements) exported to Obsidian as GENERATED, read-mostly, one-way bilingual KR+EN markdown: entity pages with provenance-weighted importance, validity windows, source citations, credibility mix, and cluster/theme notes. Summarization prompts FORBID buy/sell/price-target vocabulary, cite provenance + as-of time, and carry info-flow caveats verbatim. Human annotations namespaced separately from generated content.
layers.why: For 1-2 humans making the judgment, linked markdown with provenance-weighted importance, temporal context, and citations is a navigable, auditable surface directly serving the GOAL (human navigates and decides). Obsidian is free, local, zero-infra, trivially bilingual. The forbidden-vocabulary guardrail + verbatim caveats are the last structural enforcement of no-trading-signal — a glossy summary is one sentence from an implicit call. Keeping it one-way/read-mostly prevents drift between human edits and pipeline regeneration.
layers.alternativesRejected: Obsidian as the store/backend — RULED OUT: graph view is cosmetic, no query engine, no temporal logic, poor at scale; it must be a generated export from the DB, never source of truth. A summary that aggregates sentiment into a directional view — RULED OUT by the GOAL: launders a pump cluster into a clean 'conclusion'; every summary must expose its credibility mix and never assert beyond supplied evidence. Letting humans edit generated notes the pipeline overwrites — rejected: annotations lost; namespace human notes separately.

methodsTable.method: Cross-lingual entity resolution (deterministic ID anchor → BGE-M3/LaBSE+romanization blocking → closed-set LLM with abstain → must-link/must-not-link clustering)
methodsTable.measures: Canonical identity: collapses 삼성전자/Samsung Electronics/005930 to one node, keyed to DART corp_code / SEC CIK / ISIN / LEI / FIGI before any graph metric.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes a high-precision authoritative ID exists for listed equities (true) and the universe is bounded/enumerable. Fails on silent under-merge (graph fragments → centrality meaningless) or over-merge (Samsung Electronics≡Samsung SDI → false edges); ticker reuse over time; romanization/slang variants (삼전, 하닉) invisible to LaBSE; private/pre-IPO mentions absent from the gazetteer. Mitigate with registry anchoring, time-scoped alias edges, periodic LLM alias-mining (human-gated), and an unresolved-review queue (never force-merge).
methodsTable.cost: Deterministic join: near-zero. Embedding blocking: cheap, amortized. LLM adjudication: bounded to ambiguous residue only — the dominant lever. All single-node (DuckDB/Splink + pgvector).

methodsTable.method: Bi-temporal modeling (event/valid-time + ingest/knowledge-time) on every node, edge, and credibility quantity
methodsTable.measures: Point-in-time correctness: what was knowable as-of date T; reproducible as-of-T snapshots with no lookahead, including through the credibility channel.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes sources expose/imply an event time and that crawl-time (not DB-insert time) is captured. Fatal failure: filtering the as-of-T view on event/valid-time instead of knowledge/ingest-time reintroduces lookahead; community event_time is often ambiguous (default conservatively to ingest_time, flag low-confidence). The subtle leak: computing reputation/corroboration on the full graph counts voices that hadn't spoken by T. Mitigate: knowledge-time is a mandatory query parameter; frozen-as-of-T snapshot test asserts no high-T-only source influences the T view.
methodsTable.cost: Storage overhead of versioned rows + two indexes (knowledge-time, valid-time): trivial at this scale. Real cost is ingest-pipeline discipline, not compute.

methodsTable.method: Credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank + TrustRank teleport, fused with truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene) and independence-aware corroboration (CIB/pump detection)
methodsTable.measures: Provenance-folded importance: TRUE over LOUD. Rank = topology × source-class prior × independence-corroborated veracity, with a provenance-decomposed score showing how much rank comes from trusted vs adversarial edges.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes a defensible per-source credibility prior (regulator filings high; 종토방/Reddit/Telegram low) and that corroboration counts INDEPENDENT sources. Without credibility folding, raw centrality ranks coordinated pump volume (the design failure). Independence is hard to verify — KR/US communities echo and copy filings; if CIB under-detects, correlated voices still multiply credibility. Mitigate: default to LOW independence unless proven; treat shared-text/synchronized-timing as same-source; truth-discovery needs canonicalized comparable claims (실적 서프라이즈 = earnings beat).
methodsTable.cost: Sparse power iteration on a single node: seconds-to-minutes at 10^5-10^6 nodes. Truth-discovery EM: cheap at this scale. Recompute on batch cadence + incremental on deltas.

methodsTable.method: Leiden community detection (recursive, fixed seed) on the credibility-weighted graph, FUSED with BERTopic/HDBSCAN over multilingual embeddings
methodsTable.measures: Clusters + nested hierarchy: structural communities fused with semantic themes; agreement between the two = strong evidence the theme is real, not an artifact.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes modular structure and a strong multilingual encoder so KR+EN co-cluster. Louvain (the predecessor) can yield internally DISCONNECTED communities — the specific reason to use Leiden. UMAP/HDBSCAN are stochastic (fix random_state) and HDBSCAN dumps low-density items into a noise bucket where genuine novelty AND junk both live — route it to the credibility filter, not silently into a theme. Weak multilingual embedding fragments a KR theme from its EN equivalent. Validate clusters on real 종토방/Reddit samples; report stability (consensus / variation of information), not a single fragile partition.
methodsTable.cost: Leiden: near-linear, fast single-node. UMAP+HDBSCAN: moderate, batch-recomputed; embeddings reused from the vector layer. Optional LLM label refinement: bounded.

methodsTable.method: Info-flow / lead-lag: ADF+KPSS stationarity → mutual-information screen → Granger → conditional/multivariate effective transfer entropy → IAAFT surrogates → Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR
methodsTable.measures: Directional information flow (does information arrival lead a price/other series), reported ONLY as FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated annotated edges — never a recommendation.
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: The highest-risk stage — most likely to produce confident garbage. Bivariate TE/Granger on non-stationary price LEVELS invent spurious common-driver edges (a macro shock moves both news and price → false 'news causes price'). Finite-sample TE is biased upward. Mitigate: test stationarity on RETURNS not prices; condition on index/sector/macro common drivers; subtract surrogate bias (effective TE); IAAFT surrogates preserve autocorrelation so you don't reject the null just for being autocorrelated; Benjamini-YEKULIETI (not just Hochberg) because market test statistics are cross-sectionally correlated; build series on event-time via the bi-temporal layer to guard lookahead. The absolute trap: reading a significant edge as a trading signal.
methodsTable.cost: Granger: cheap. Conditional/multivariate TE + IAAFT + FDR across thousands of pairs: the most expensive analytic — bounded by MI-screening the pair set first and single-node batch scheduling. Time is explicitly not the constraint here; rigor is.

methodsTable.method: GraphRAG map-reduce hierarchical summarization with provenance grounding and forbidden buy/sell vocabulary; local NLI entailment on high-stakes edges
methodsTable.measures: Hierarchical theme summaries → ranked keywords + clustered conclusions + evidence + caveats (the deliverable); plus faithfulness verification of high-stakes edges (span entails triple).
methodsTable.assumptionsFailureModes: Assumes communities are coherent and the LLM summarizes only supplied evidence. Risks: hallucination/unsupported synthesis; bias-laundering (a pump cluster's summary launders manipulation into a clean 'conclusion'); lossy aggregation hiding dissent; crossing into an implicit recommendation. NLI models are imperfect and weaker in Korean (use multilingual/Korean NLI or translate-then-check). Mitigate: every summary cites provenance + as-of time, exposes its credibility mix, carries info-flow caveats verbatim; prompts forbid buy/sell/price-target language; NLI gated to supply-chain/catalyst/high-rank-low-credibility edges only.
methodsTable.cost: Summarization is the dominant LLM cost but bounded: summarize COMMUNITIES not raw items, reuse element summaries across levels, recompute only changed communities, threshold by importance/credibility. NLI: local small-model inference on a filtered subset, cheap per checked edge.

tradeoffs: Spine: all-Postgres (one engine, one transaction/backup, no cross-engine desync, explicit auditable bi-temporal) vs Graphiti/FalkorDB (free incremental episode model + tested supersession). I chose all-Postgres because the credibility agent showed Graphiti's auto-invalidation would erase the rumor trail an analyst needs and you must bolt on provenance/resolution anyway — but I now own hand-rolling validity-interval supersession, the easiest place for rigor to silently fail.

Apache AGE is operationally fiddly (source install, no reliable prebuilt image, trails newest PG majors, less mature deep-traversal Cypher than Neo4j) — acceptable only because traversal depth is shallow at this scale and time/rigor budget absorbs the setup-and-upgrade tax.

pgvector (~11ms) vs a dedicated vector store (~4ms): I deliberately give up vector-search latency/scale, which is irrelevant at 1-2 consumers, to avoid a stateful service to snapshot/secure/version. Reconsider only if embedding volume balloons past ~50M.

Cost-tiering trades coverage for affordability: cheap models are materially weaker in Korean, so a language-blind triage false-negative permanently drops a KR item before the good model sees it. Mitigation (Korean-aware thresholds + periodic frontier audits of dropped KR items) costs ongoing tuning and can never be perfect.

Self-hosted Crawl4AI keeps cost near-zero and data in-house but its true cost is hidden DevOps (Playwright browser servers, proxy rotation, parser maintenance against shifting Korean portal HTML). Firecrawl SaaS is the paid escape hatch only for the few hostile anti-bot targets.

Aggressive pre-extraction dedup cuts LLM cost AND prevents fake consensus from inflating importance, but over-aggressive merging can collapse genuinely distinct events phrased alike — thresholds must be tuned per source and validated.

Conditional/multivariate transfer entropy with surrogates and FDR is far more expensive and complex than bivariate Granger, and buys correctness, not speed — justified only because rigor is the explicit goal and time is not constrained.

The dynamic-hybrid ontology (fixed core + human-gated new relation types) trades recall (a static ontology caps novel supply-chain/catalyst relations) against consistency (a loose one breaks node collapse) — and only works if the human review queue is actually maintained.
whatYouGiveUp: The system DELIBERATELY emits no actionable signal — no buy/sell, no price target, no aggregated directional view. Its value is only as good as the human driving it; a passive or unskilled operator gets a beautifully organized structure and no edge. This is the GOAL, not a defect, but it is what you give up versus a signal-generating system.

Most of the load-bearing rigor — ticker-anchored cross-lingual entity resolution, provenance-weighted/independence-aware importance, and the gated info-flow pipeline — has NO off-the-shelf implementation. This is a large custom build with no batteries-included substitute; the engineering is the project.

By choosing all-Postgres I give up Graphiti's free incremental dedup, episode model, and battle-tested bi-temporal supersession, and take on the single easiest place for rigor to silently fail (validity-interval supersession), mitigated only by disciplined frozen-as-of-T snapshot testing.

I give up Reddit as a core US-retail source (Nov-2025 AI-training prohibition) and broad continuous X ingestion (pay-per-use economics) — the US-retail/social sentiment tier is thinner and more compliance-constrained than the KR tier; Telegram crypto channels and narrow X cashtag pulls partly fill the gap.

I give up vector-search latency/throughput and any distributed serving capability (Kafka/Spark/distributed-Neo4j/Qdrant) — fine at 1-2 consumers, but the design does not scale to a many-user product without re-architecting the serving side.

Cluster/theme quality on noisy bilingual Korean retail slang is unproven; without a strong multilingual encoder and KR-aware prompts the hierarchy may be incoherent — you give up confidence in the clustering until it's validated on real 종토방/Reddit samples.

Obsidian presentation is read-mostly and one-way; you give up live human editing of generated notes (annotations would be overwritten) — human notes must live in a separate namespace, a usability constraint on the analyst's workflow.
phasing: PHASE 0 (MVP spine, structurally-correct + high-credibility first): Stand up single Postgres + pgvector + Apache AGE. Build the Issuer→Security→Listing canonical store and deterministic ID resolution seeded from DART corp_code + SEC CIK registries (no community sources yet). Ingest ONLY Tier-1 structured spine (DART, EDGAR, GDELT, Alpaca/CCXT) via Dagster, stamping event_time + ingest_time. This gives a correct, low-noise bilingual graph before any adversarial data — the advisor's ordering: build the high-credibility spine first.

PHASE 1 (extraction + bi-temporal): Add schema-guided extraction through strict function-calling with the fixed-core financial ontology, emitting the full provenance schema. Implement explicit bi-temporal validity columns + supersession (parallel competing edges) and the frozen-as-of-T snapshot test asserting no lookahead. Add the cheap pre-filter cascade (trafilatura→lingua→Kiwi→MinHash→BGE-M3) and Haiku→Opus tiering with prompt-caching/batch.

PHASE 2 (importance with credibility): Implement credibility-weighted Personalized-PageRank + TrustRank teleport seeded on filing nodes, plus truth-discovery (TruthFinder/Dawid-Skene), making reputation/corroboration bi-temporal (as-of T). Now — and only now that credibility weighting exists to protect against LOUD-over-TRUE — begin adding the Tier-2 adversarial community sources (종토방/네이버/토스 via Crawl4AI, Telegram via Telethon) at LOW credibility weight, with closed-set LLM resolution + abstain + human review queue.

PHASE 3 (clustering + presentation): Add recursive Leiden + BERTopic fusion for the navigable theme hierarchy and the GraphRAG map-reduce summarization with forbidden buy/sell vocabulary. Build the one-way DB→Obsidian bilingual markdown exporter. Validate clusters on real 종토방/Reddit samples before trusting the hierarchy. At this point the analyst has a usable navigable surface.

PHASE 4 (the dangerous analytic, last): Build the gated info-flow pipeline (ADF+KPSS→MI→Granger→conditional/multivariate effective TE→IAAFT→Benjamini-Yekutieli FDR) producing only FDR-surviving, effect-sized, caveated directional edges. Built LAST, deliberately, because it is the most likely to mislead and must sit behind the credibility weighting and no-signal guardrails that already exist. Add periodic offline RAPTOR-style enrichment and local NLI verification on high-stakes edges as final polish.
openQuestions: LOAD-BEARING (the cost of the all-Postgres choice): the frozen-as-of-T no-lookahead test must be designed and proven before the analyst trusts any as-of conclusion — specifically that NO credibility/reputation/corroboration computation leaks knowledge-time > T. If hand-rolled validity-interval supersession can't be proven correct, the Graphiti-on-FalkorDB fallback re-enters consideration.

OpenDART daily call quota could not be confirmed from official pages (only that limits are posted and FSS-adjustable) — verify the live number before scaling KR ingest, and size the crawl budget conservatively until then.

What is the minimum viable source-credibility prior taxonomy, and how is it calibrated/audited over time? Track abstain-rate spikes and B-cubed/pairwise P/R on a hand-labeled KR+EN gold set as data-distribution-shift signals rather than auto-lowering thresholds.

Is a strong-enough multilingual embedding + KR-aware extraction prompt available to make BERTopic/Leiden co-cluster KR and EN themes coherently on noisy retail slang? Must be validated on held-out KR+EN pairs before the cluster hierarchy is trusted.

Independence verification for corroboration: how aggressively can CIB/pump detection collapse coordinated 종토방/Telegram clusters to ~one effective source without over-merging legitimate independent confirmation? Default-low-independence is the safe stance, but its false-negative cost (suppressing real corroboration) needs measurement.

Claim canonicalization debt: truth-discovery requires comparable claim objects across KR+EN (실적 서프라이즈 = earnings beat). How robust is the claim-normalization step, and does it degrade gracefully when entity resolution or normalization is weak?

Telegram/X account and legal risk: how durable is messages-only Telethon capture against FloodWait/PeerFlood, and what is the acceptable legal/TOS posture for KR portal scraping given ongoing HTML drift and parser maintenance?
